name: tabnine-vscode
description: All-language autocompleter — TabNine uses machine learning to help you write code faster.
author: Jacob Jackson

tabnine.disable_line_regex.description: Disable TabNine when the current line contains a match of any of the provided regexes. For example, add "require" to disable TabNine when the current line contains the word 'require'.

tabnine.disable_file_regex.description: Disable TabNine when the file path contains a match of any of the provided regexes. For example, add "[.]js$" to disable TabNine in JavaScript files.

tabnine.experimentalAutoImports.description: Experimental: Enable modules auto-import following applying TabNine suggestions

tabnine.logFilePath.description: TabNine's log file (Visual Studio Code must be restarted for this setting to take effect)

tabnine.positionInList.description: Position of TabNine completions in the completion list

tabnine.trigger.description: Trigger TabNine on every character, can be 'on', 'off' or comma-separated list of language IDs
